title: crataegus oxyacantha var. genuina
intro: Crataegus oxyacantha var. genuina, also known as the wild or true hawthorn, is a type of deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the family Rosaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiovascular-protective effects. The health benefits of Crataegus oxyacantha var. genuina are numerous, with studies suggesting that it may help lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant protection against age-related diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support heart health and overall well-being.
